description_long: This object consists of two thick, cylindrical wooden logs joined at the base, forming a V-shape. The logs have rough, textured bark with visible knots, patches of moss, and some lighter areas where the bark is chipped or missing. The cut surfaces at the top are flat and show the natural rings and grain of the wood, indicating they have been sawed cleanly. The bark is predominantly dark brown with some grayish and yellowish patches, and the wood inside is lighter in color. The object appears solid and heavy, with no visible mechanical or metallic parts, handles, or moving components. There are no visible brand markings, safety features, or power source indicators present on the exterior.
description: A V-shaped pair of thick, rough wooden logs with cut tops and textured bark, showing natural wood grain and moss patches.
description_view_0: Two thick logs joined at the base, with the left log appearing slightly in front and both cut tops visible.
description_view_1: The V-shape is most pronounced, showing the inner junction and bark texture, with both cut surfaces clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the thickness of the left log and the rough, bark-covered surface with some lighter patches.
description_view_3: Another V-shaped view, with the right log more prominent and the bark's roughness and moss patches visible.
attribute_handle_design: No handles are visible; the object consists solely of two joined wooden logs.
